settings.heading: Privacy Policy
settings.intro: How we collect, use, and protect your information.

settings.content:
This is a starting template. Review with a qualified professional and tailor it to your business and jurisdiction before publishing. Shopify can also generate a base privacy policy under Settings → Policies.

Information we collect

We collect information you provide (such as name, email, shipping address, and order details) and information collected automatically (such as device and usage data) to operate our store and fulfil your orders.

How we use it

To process orders, provide support, improve our store, prevent fraud, and — with your consent — send marketing communications you can opt out of at any time.

Sharing

We share data with service providers (e.g. payment, shipping, analytics) only as needed to run the store, and as required by law.

Your rights

Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, or delete your data. Contact us at [SUPPORT EMAIL] to make a request.

Contact

Questions about privacy? Email [SUPPORT EMAIL].
